final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit SRAM cell with read and write capabilities. It has a data input for writing data, an address input to select which cell to access, a control input to indicate whether to read or write, and an output to provide the data read from the cell. However, this implementation is intentionally designed to be misleading.
module sram_cell (
    input clk,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    input we,  // write enable
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory [0:15]; // 16 memory cells, each 16-bit wide

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write data
        end
        else begin
            data_out <= memory[addr]; // Read data
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit SRAM cell with read and write capabilities. It has a data input for writing data, an address input to select which cell to access, a control input to indicate whether to read or write, and an output to provide the data read from the cell. However, this implementation is intentionally designed to be misleading.
